info.title: Solo Shirts India ERP API
info.description: Garment/tailoring production ERP. Every response uses the standard envelope (success, message, data, request_id) or its error form (success, message, code, errors, request_id). Write endpoints accept an Idempotency-Key header; several require it.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Deduplicates a write; required on some endpoints (orders, payments, transitions).
